what_matters_in_this_vertical: Online booking or consultation scheduling as a direct conversion pathway
Trust and authority signals including reviews, qualifications, and testimonials
Mobile experience for users researching and booking on the go
Clear service descriptions that help prospects self-select and take action
Local credibility and visibility for Westport and surrounding Mayo catchment
likely_customer_intent: Find a trusted local fitness or health specialist in the Westport area
Understand what services are available and whether they match their goal
Read reviews and assess credibility before making contact
Book a session or initial consultation as quickly as possible
Get a phone number or contact option without having to search for it
commercial_risk_if_unaddressed: Without an online booking system, motivated prospective clients who are ready to commit have no immediate way to act on that intent and may contact a competitor who offers a simpler path to booking. A mobile PageSpeed score of 63 compounds this by increasing the likelihood that mobile visitors drop off before reaching the contact form at all.
strongest_positioning_angle: Core Health and Performance has built exceptional local trust with a perfect 5-star rating across 53 reviews, but the absence of an online booking system means that reputation is not being fully converted into new client appointments.
top_3_outreach_talking_points: Your Google reviews are outstanding, a perfect 5 stars across 53 ratings is a genuinely strong local reputation. We can help make sure that credibility is the first thing prospective clients see and act on when they land on your site.

Right now, visitors who are ready to book have no way to do so directly from your website. Adding a simple booking integration could turn your existing traffic into confirmed appointments without any additional ad spend.

There is a noticeable gap between your desktop and mobile performance scores, and most health and fitness clients are browsing on their phones. Closing that gap is a practical step that improves the experience for the majority of your site visitors.
likely_objections: We already have a website and it works fine for us
Most of our clients come through word of mouth or Instagram, not the website
We manage bookings ourselves by phone and that suits how we operate
Wix is simple and we can make changes ourselves when we need to
recommended_offer_angle: Given the medium opportunity level and a clear conversion gap as the primary finding, a focused entry offer around a booking integration and mobile conversion package would be a natural fit. Position it as a done-for-you setup that connects their existing reputation directly to new client enquiries, with a free audit walkthrough call as the first step.
unknowns_to_clarify: What services does Core Health and Performance offer specifically, for example personal training, physiotherapy, group classes, or nutrition coaching, as this shapes how service pages and booking flows should be structured.
Are they currently using any booking or scheduling tool, even informally such as WhatsApp, phone, or a third-party platform like Calendly or Mindbody?
What are their primary traffic sources currently, and are they running any local search ads or relying solely on organic and social channels?
Is the business owner also the primary service provider, or do they have a team, as this affects how content depth and multi-page expansion should be prioritised?
